title: Creating a User Persona
scenario: A marketing team needs to create a user persona for a new product. The persona should include demographic information, behavioral characteristics, and pain points. The persona should be based on real data and should be specific to the target audience.
constraints: Must include at least 5 demographic characteristics
Must include at least 3 behavioral characteristics

evaluationCriteria.description: The demographic characteristics are accurate and consistent with real data.
The behavioral characteristics are accurate and consistent with real data.
The persona is specific to the target audience and accurately reflects their needs and pain points.
